zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Cathcart於大約1393年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾卡夫卡特時，她的父親Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,32歲，母親Janet Maxwell20歲。她與Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安格雷布利其結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1424年8月17日在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安格雷布利其享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Cathcart于大约1393年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾卡夫卡特时，她的父亲Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,32岁，母亲Janet Maxwell20岁。她与Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy在苏格兰米德洛迪安格雷布利其结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1424年8月17日在苏格兰米德洛迪安格雷布利其享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cathcart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Cathcart was born about 1393, in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,, was 32 and her mother, Janet Maxwell, was 20. She married Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 17 August 1424, in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Cathcart est née environ 1393, à Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Janet Maxwell, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy à Gorebridge, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 août 1424, à Gorebridge, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Cathcart um 1393 in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart, 32 und ihre Mutter Janet Maxwell 20. Sie hat in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 17. August 1424 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Cathcart è nata il circa 1393 nel Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Janet Maxwell, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy nel Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 17 agosto 1424, nel Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Cathcartが約1393年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアカスカートで生まれた時，父Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,は32歳，母Janet Maxwellは20歳であった。スコットランドミドロスアンゴアブリッジでSir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1424年8月17日にスコットランドミドロスアンゴアブリッジで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Cathcart(이)가 대략 1393년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 캐스카트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Maxwell(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 고레브리지에서 Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 8월 17일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 고레브리지에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Cathcart nasceu aproximadamente 1393, em Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Janet Maxwell, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy em Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1424, em Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Cathcart родилась около 1393 г. в местности каткарт, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart, было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Maxwell, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy в местности горебридж, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 августа 1424 г. в местности горебридж, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Cathcart nació aproximadamente 1393, en Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Janet Maxwell, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy en Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1424, en Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 32 años.
